results.title: 'He asks questions all the time': Abhishek Sharma reveals what Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is really like
results.description: Fifteen-year-old Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is making waves in Indian cricket after a stellar IPL 2026 and a record-breaking List A innings. Despite a maiden T20I call-up for the Ireland tour, he was benched for the first match. Teammate Abhishek Sharma praised his eagerness to learn, while the team's batting struggles in the opener have intensified calls for Sooryavanshi's debut.

results.title: B.C. twins drafted by same NHL team
Šveđani izborili knockout fazu Svjetskog prvenstva, ali svi pričaju o prizoru uoči odlučujuće utakmice
results.description: Pripreme za utakmicu knockout faze Svjetskog nogometnog prvenstva Šveđani će pamtiti i po jednoj neobičnoj epizodi izvan terena. Tijekom boravka u Dallasu igrači su se susreli sa scenom koja više podsjeća na početak građevinskog projekta nego na objekt koji je domaćin najvećeg nogometnog natjecanja.

results.title: Ilmari Niskanen and Josh Magennis join League One sides after leaving Exeter City
results.description: The pair have both found new clubs in the third tier with Niskanen joining Blackpool while Magennis has been signed by Stevenage.

results.title: Kimi Antonelli makes bold Ferrari accusation after F1 qualifying disappointment
results.description: Andrea Kimi Antonelli accused Ferrari of "sandbagging" after showing drastic improvements in qualifying for the Formula 1 Austrian Grand Prix, seeing him pegged down to fourth place. The post Kimi Antonelli makes bold Ferrari accusation after F1 qualifying disappointment appeared first on Motorsport Week .

results.title: West Ham United identify Crysencio Summerville replacement
results.description: Despite their ongoing battle to sign another central midfielder following the coup of Ederson from Atalanta, Manchester United will be keeping half an eye on other areas of the team to bolster through the transfer market this summer.

results.title: FIFA WC 2026: Egypt sweat over Salah's fitness ahead of historic knockout match against Australia
results.description: New York, June 27 (IANS) Egypt have been handed an injury scare ahead of their historic FIFA World Cup last 32 clash against Australia after star forward Mohamed Salah suffered a knee problem during his side's final group-stage match.The former Liverpool striker was forced off in the 57th minute of Egypt's 1-1 draw against Iran in Seattle after experiencing discomfort in his left knee. Salah was replaced by Mostafa Zico, raising concerns among Egyptian fans just days before the country's biggest World Cup match in history.Speaking after the game, Egypt head coach Hossam Hassan sought to ease fears over the condition of his captain. The coach revealed that Salah had spoken positively about the injury and believed it was not a serious setback."I have spoken to Salah, and he told me that he is going to recover and that it is not a serious injury," Hassan told reporters after the match.The coach added that there was still enough time before Egypt's knockout fixture to help Salah regain full fitness. He expressed confidence in the medical staff and remained optimistic that the 34-year-old would be available against Australia next Friday."We still have time to work with the medical team, and I think he will be back. When I spoke to him, he assured me he would recover," Hassan said.Egypt reached the knockout stage of the FIFA World Cup for the first time in the nation's history after finishing their group-stage campaign, marking a landmark achievement for African football. The team will now look to continue its dream run when it faces Australia in the round of 32.Salah has been one of Egypt's standout performers at the tournament. The experienced forward has scored one goal and provided two assists in the group stage while also leading the team with his experience and composure in crucial moments.

results.title: Naomi Osaka retires in second set of Bad Homburg final with foot injury
results.description: Naomi Osaka's Wimbledon preparations received a setback when she retired at the start of the second set in Saturday's Bad Homburg Open final because of a foot injury.
